item.title: IndyyProg: Harry reposteó MrK @IndyyProg · 56s En respuesta a @FPL_Harry I just realized I literally forgot to activate my bench b
item.description: Harry reposteó MrK @IndyyProg · 56s En respuesta a @FPL_Harry I just realized I literally forgot to activate my bench boost. Jesus christ, calamity avoided, thank u so much! 1 2 5

item.title:
EvertonAcademy: Everton reposteó Everton Academy @EvertonAcademy · 1h Just the 12 goals at Goodison Park this evening...
What a game,
item.description:
Everton reposteó Everton Academy @EvertonAcademy · 1h Just the 12 goals at Goodison Park this evening...
What a game, and a big #PL2 win for #EFCU21! 2 39 148 10 mil

item.title: TBurrows16: The Athletic | Football reposteó Tom Burrows @TBurrows16 · 7min After 25 years, Coventry City have returned to the Premi
item.description:
The Athletic | Football reposteó Tom Burrows @TBurrows16 · 7min After 25 years, Coventry City have returned to the Premier League - sparking jubilant scenes in the away end at Ewood Park tonight
A look at their remarkable journey back, the painful near misses - and Frank Lampard’s impact
#PUSB De nytimes.com 3 5 25 2 mil

item.title: SJohnsonSport: Simon Johnson @SJohnsonSport · 16 abr. Rosenior says Fernandez has been training very well, business as usual. #CFC 1 8
item.description: Simon Johnson @SJohnsonSport · 16 abr. Rosenior says Fernandez has been training very well, business as usual. #CFC 1 8 173 7 mil

item.title: SJohnsonSport: Simon Johnson @SJohnsonSport · 16 abr. En respuesta a @SJohnsonSport Reveals Colwill will play some minutes for the Und
item.description: Simon Johnson @SJohnsonSport · 16 abr. En respuesta a @SJohnsonSport Reveals Colwill will play some minutes for the Under-21s tomorrow. Chalobah closer, decision if involved v Man Utd tomorrow. 4 26 5 mil

item.title: SJohnsonSport: Simon Johnson @SJohnsonSport · 3min En respuesta a @SJohnsonSport Am told Colwill played 60 minutes in a behind closed
item.description: Simon Johnson @SJohnsonSport · 3min En respuesta a @SJohnsonSport Am told Colwill played 60 minutes in a behind closed doors friendly for u-21s today. All went well. More good news for #CFC. But as Rosenior makes clear, his return to the first team won’t be rushed…understandably everyone wants to make sure he’s fully good to go. 1 7 445

item.title: FPLFocal: FPL Focal @FPLFocal · 5min Final reminder Scout are doing 3 weeks Free Premium membership. They're stopping the offer at
item.description:
FPL Focal @FPLFocal · 5min Final reminder Scout are doing 3 weeks Free Premium membership. They're stopping the offer at the GW33 deadline
http:// s.id/FPLFocal (ad) 2 1 mil
